repository_purpose: Generate accurate, updated daily WhatsApp focus posts from monthly call review data.
business_context: Precision Tune Auto Care Automotive Hospitality phone training.
strict_required_greeting: Thank you for choosing Precision Tune Auto Care, my name is [employee’s name], who do I have the pleasure of speaking with?
campaign_title: Own the First 10 Seconds. Control the Last 30 Seconds.
posting_cadence: One post every weekday for three weeks.
